SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOE TUTTIMELON CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANE, LISA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,083.00, THE COURT FINDS THE CONTRACT WAS NOT CONTINGENT ON DEFENDANT OBTAINING FINANCING AND THAT DEFENDANT'S PERFORMANCE HAS NOT BEEN EXCUSED.
